name: Falafel (Lebanese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the chick peas.
2. Quarter the onion and potato.
3. Run all ingredients through a fine grinder two times, adding garlic each time.
4. Add remaining ingredients (except baking soda and vegetable oil) to the mixture and mix well.
5. Run the mixture through the grinder one more time and mix again.
6. Cover and let rest for 2-3 hours.
7. Heat oil for deep frying.
8. While heating, add baking soda to the chick pea mixture with dampened hands.
9. Form mixture into balls the size of a walnut and flatten slightly into patties.
10. Deep fry until patties are cooked through and golden brown.
11. Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
